zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Mortimer於1313年2月14日出生在英國史洛普爾盧德洛福 卡素時，她的父親Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March25歲，母親Joan de Geneville27歲。她於1325年2月22日與Sir Thomas de Beauchamp 11th Earl of Warwick在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和10個女兒的父母。她於1339年住在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾沃里克沃里克 卡素且於1350年住在蘇格蘭斯林史爾布坎南。她去世於1369年8月4日在英國瓦維其可爾沃里克享年56歲，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾沃里克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Mortimer于1313年2月14日出生在英国史洛普爾盧德洛福 卡素时，她的父亲Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March25岁，母亲Joan de Geneville27岁。她于1325年2月22日与Sir Thomas de Beauchamp 11th Earl of Warwick在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和10个女儿的父母。她于1339年住在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾沃里克沃里克 卡素且于1350年住在苏格兰斯林史爾布坎南。她去世于1369年8月4日在英国瓦維其可爾沃里克享年56岁，埋葬在英国瓦維其可爾沃里克。

nameMeanings.name: Mortimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortemer in Seine-Maritime, France, so called from Old French mort(e) ‘dead’ + mer ‘sea’, probably referring to a stagnant pond or drained swamp.

Irish (of Norman origin): the Norman surname in sense 1 above was taken to Ireland from England in the medieval period, where it has also been adopted by bearers of the Gaelic surnames Mac Muircheartaigh and ÓMuircheartaigh, commonly Anglicized as McMurty and Mortagh. Compare McMurdo .

variants.name: Mortimore
meanings: English (Devon; of Norman origin): variant of   Mortimer  .

variants.name: McMurdo
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muircheartaigh or Mac Muircheartaich, ‘son of Muircheartach’, a personal name meaning ‘sea-ruler’. In Scotland the name was often lenited to give McCurdy . Compare Murdoch and Moriarty . The name was also used to Anglicize Mac Murchaidh (see McMorrow ).

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Mortimer was born on 14 February 1313, in Ludlow Castle, Shropshire, England, her father, Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March, was 25 and her mother, Joan de Geneville, was 27. She married Sir Thomas de Beauchamp 11th Earl of Warwick on 22 February 1325, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 10 daughters. She lived in Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom in 1339 and Buchanan, Stirlingshire, Scotland in 1350. She died on 4 August 1369, in Warwick, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in Warwick, Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Mortimer est née le 14 février 1313, à Ludlow Castle, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Joan de Geneville, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas de Beauchamp 11th Earl of Warwick le 22 février 1325, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 10 filles. Elle a vécu à Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1339 et à Buchanan, Stirlingshire, Écosse en 1350. Elle est décédée le 4 août 1369, à Warwick, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Warwick, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Mortimer am 14. Februar 1313 in Ludlow Castle, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March 25 und ihre Mutter Joan de Geneville 27. Sie hat am 22. Februar 1325 in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas de Beauchamp 11th Earl of Warwick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 10 Töchter. 1339 hat sie in Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom und 1350 in Buchanan, Stirlingshire, Scotland gelebt. Sie starb am 4. August 1369 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Warwick, Warwickshire, England und wurde in Warwick, Warwickshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Mortimer è nata il il 14 febbraio 1313 nel Ludlow Castle, Shropshire, England, sua padre, Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Joan de Geneville, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas de Beauchamp 11th Earl of Warwick il 22 febbraio 1325, nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 10 figlie. Vissuto a Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1339 e nel Buchanan, Stirlingshire, Scotland nel 1350. Morì il 4 agosto 1369, nel Warwick, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a Warwick, Warwickshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Mortimerが1313年2月14日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアルドロウ カストルで生まれた時，父Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of Marchは25歳，母Joan de Genevilleは27歳であった。1325年2月22日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアでSir Thomas de Beauchamp 11th Earl of Warwickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と10人の娘の親であった。彼女は1339年にはイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアワーウィックワーウィック カストルに，1350年にはスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアブチャナンに住んでいた。彼女は1369年8月4日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアワーウィックで56歳で死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアワーウィックにて埋葬された。

ko.Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, E: 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 워윅 워윅 카스틀
ko.Vendôme 1er Canton, Vendôme, Loir-et-Che: 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처 븐드o 븐드o 1어 캔턴
ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Mortimer(이)가 1313년 2월 14일 영국 슈럽실르 루들로 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Geneville(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1325년 2월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 Sir Thomas de Beauchamp 11th Earl of Warwick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 1339년도에 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 워윅 워윅 카스틀에서, 1350년도에 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 버챈아에서 살았다. 그녀는 1369년 8월 4일 영국 워윅실르 워윅에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르 워윅에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Mortimer nasceu em 14 de fevereiro de 1313, em Ludlow Castle, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Geneville, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas de Beauchamp 11th Earl of Warwick em 22 de fevereiro de 1325, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 10 filhas. Ela viveu em Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1339 e em Buchanan, Stirlingshire, Scotland em 1350. Ela faleceu em 4 de agosto de 1369, em Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Mortimer родилась 14 февраля 1313 г. в местности лудлоу кастл, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Geneville, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas de Beauchamp 11th Earl of Warwick 22 февраля 1325 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 10 дочерей. Она жила в местности варвикк кастл, варвикк, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в 1339 году и в местности бучанан, стирлингшир, Шотландия в 1350 году. Она умерла 4 августа 1369 г. в местности варвикк, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности варвикк, варвиккшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Mortimer nació el 14 de febrero de 1313, en Ludlow Castle, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Mortimer 1st Earl of March, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Joan de Geneville, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas de Beauchamp 11th Earl of Warwick el 22 de febrero de 1325, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 10 hijas. Vivió en Warwick Castle, Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1339 y en Buchanan, Stirlingshire, Scotland en 1350. Murió el 4 de agosto de 1369, en Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultada en Warwick, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.
